item.title: 3.2]【2024停更潮】為何我和這群 YouTuber 都停更？...
item.itunes:title: 3.2]【2024停更潮】為何我和這群 YouTuber 都停更？...
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O7MZdgoCmAQ Hi 大家好 我是阿維，好久不見。從不可思議的 1900萬訂閱頻道到50多萬訂閱頻道？ 為什麼有好多大頻道最近都在釋出停更的消息？ 停更頻道參考： https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4mG7_-W9P1M | the end - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq8KJbaLpNk | It's time for a change - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7DKv5H5Frt0\u0026t=1s | After ten years, it's time to stop weekly videos. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WDNQiFJteLw | I Bought His Company | What's the future of Full Time Filmmaker? - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8R1_TqU68yo | Goodbye Internet - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0Gw3zXXKrks | Goodbye For Now. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8M5RqR0AtAM | Minecraft - Thanks For Watching [823] - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NUdTPE1SG_A | Goodbye - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3aZQXfBpk-Y | Retiring - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_oWyt693-Q | It's been fun. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yhal6z2hDZ8 | Hiatus. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bl5H-IYxJwI\u0026t=191s | 這群人 TGOP │這群人停更 The Break from TGOP Video Updates - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lJrHLnhJl-M | Press This Button = Win $100,000! - YouTube ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 停更潮 01:07 頻道各自的停更原因 02:18 我的原因1 02:45 中文圈 05:55 我的原因2 05:05 停更的實況主 08:48 為何都在這個時間點上停更 13:31 結語 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O7MZdgoCmAQ Hi 大家好 我是阿維，好久不見。從不可思議的 1900萬訂閱頻道到50多萬訂閱頻道？ 為什麼有好多大頻道最近都在釋出停更的消息？ 停更頻道參考： https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4mG7_-W9P1M | the end - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq8KJbaLpNk | It's time for a change - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7DKv5H5Frt0\u0026t=1s | After ten years, it's time to stop weekly videos. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WDNQiFJteLw | I Bought His Company | What's the future of Full Time Filmmaker? - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8R1_TqU68yo | Goodbye Internet - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0Gw3zXXKrks | Goodbye For Now. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8M5RqR0AtAM | Minecraft - Thanks For Watching [823] - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NUdTPE1SG_A | Goodbye - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3aZQXfBpk-Y | Retiring - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_oWyt693-Q | It's been fun. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yhal6z2hDZ8 | Hiatus. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bl5H-IYxJwI\u0026t=191s | 這群人 TGOP │這群人停更 The Break from TGOP Video Updates - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lJrHLnhJl-M | Press This Button = Win $100,000! - YouTube ------------------------ 【歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 停更潮 01:07 頻道各自的停更原因 02:18 我的原因1 02:45 中文圈 05:55 我的原因2 05:05 停更的實況主 08:48 為何都在這個時間點上停更 13:31 結語 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O7MZdgoCmAQ
Hi 大家好 我是阿維，好久不見。從不可思議的 1900萬訂閱頻道到50多萬訂閱頻道？
為什麼有好多大頻道最近都在釋出停更的消息？

停更頻道參考：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4mG7_-W9P1M | the end - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq8KJbaLpNk | It's time for a change - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7DKv5H5Frt0\u0026t=1s | After ten years, it's time to stop weekly videos. - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WDNQiFJteLw | I Bought His Company | What's the future of Full Time Filmmaker? - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8R1_TqU68yo | Goodbye Internet - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0Gw3zXXKrks | Goodbye For Now. - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8M5RqR0AtAM | Minecraft - Thanks For Watching [823] - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NUdTPE1SG_A | Goodbye - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3aZQXfBpk-Y | Retiring - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_oWyt693-Q | It's been fun. - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yhal6z2hDZ8 | Hiatus. - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bl5H-IYxJwI\u0026t=191s | 這群人 TGOP │這群人停更 The Break from TGOP Video Updates - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lJrHLnhJl-M | Press This Button = Win $100,000! - YouTube

------------------------
【歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 停更潮
01:07 頻道各自的停更原因
02:18 我的原因1
02:45 中文圈
05:55 我的原因2
05:05 停更的實況主
08:48 為何都在這個時間點上停更
13:31 結語

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【推薦你的影片】
你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd
為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM
如何控制夢？   ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l
為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh
失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT
你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn
